description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with exaggerated proportions, featuring a tall, elongated head and a broad torso. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and long pants, with a visible apron tied around the waist, suggesting a working or service role. The arms are extended outward in a T-pose, and the hands and feet are simplified in form. The face is minimally detailed, with a prominent nose and a small mouth, and the head is topped with a short, upright hairstyle. The clothing appears slightly worn, with some visible stains or discoloration on the shirt. The overall appearance is cartoonish and abstract, with smooth, matte surfaces and muted color tones.
description: A stylized adult figure in a T-pose, wearing a short-sleeved shirt, long pants, and an apron, with an elongated head and minimal facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad torso, outstretched arms, apron, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated head, profile of the face, and the apron tied at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, apron ties, and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and apron from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved shirt, long pants, and an apron tied at the waist
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
